report.summary: UX audit of 6 recently modified pages, created 3 OG images (daily-challenge, portfolio-live, streak), and implemented accessibility + validation fixes on portfolio-tracker and notifications pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Portfolio Tracker: Added ARIA labels to all interactive buttons (Add Wallet, Connect, filter, sort)
Portfolio Tracker: Added Ethereum address input validation with inline error messaging
Portfolio Tracker: Added empty state message when no wallets connected
Portfolio Tracker: Added aria-label to SVG chart element for screen reader accessibility
Notifications: Added role=checkbox and aria-checked to subscription toggle cards
Notifications: Added aria-labels to notification items and toggle cards
Notifications: Added empty state for zero notifications
Notifications: Converted notification settings checkboxes from uncontrolled to state-controlled with onChange handlers

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-daily-challenge.svg (1200x630) — lightning bolt + trophy motif with crypto symbols
OG image: og-portfolio-live.svg (1200x630) — stylized multi-chain chart dashboard
OG image: og-streak.svg (1200x630) — flame icon with ascending progression bars

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Logged for Future Sprints)
items: 4 additional pages still missing OG images (xp-attestation, referral, share, notifications)
Portfolio Tracker: hardcoded mock data with no demo indicator — needs live data integration
Portfolio Tracker: chart SVG needs screen-reader data table fallback
Notifications: no WebSocket/push notification implementation — UI is presentational only
Notifications: no delete/archive functionality despite UI suggesting it
All wrapper pages (ecosystem, daily-challenge, portfolio-onchain, portfolio-live) delegate fully to client components — loading states need to be added at page level
Color-only indicators (red/green for gains/losses) need text-based alternatives for colorblind users
